title: MR.SIGA 2 in 1 Premium Soap Dispenser and Sponge Holder, Dishwashing Soap Pump Dispenser for Kitchen Countertop, White
features: ELEGANT & MODERN DESIGN: Product contains a 2-piece drip tray, dispenser pump and transparent large capacity caddy. Simple but elegant design will match your kitchen decoration naturally. MR.SIGA soap dispenser with sponge holder is not only your household assistant, but also a great gift for your friends.

ONE HAND EASY OPERATION: Fill the caddy with your favorite dish soap, gently press down on the tray to dispense soap directly onto the sponge with one hand, and it will dispense appropriate amount of soap onto the sponge so your soap won't be wasted. You can also use scouring pad, cleaning rag, scrubber instead of sponge.

LARGE CAPACITY: 30 oz(900ml) large capacity avoids filling with dish soap frequently. Transparent caddy is made of premium MS material which is durable enough for you to use for a long time. MR.SIGA soap dispenser features a tidy and neat looking in the kitchen and keeps your dishwashing tools to be reached easily.

DETACHABLE DRIP TRAY CATCHES RESIDUAL LIQUID: Detachable 2-piece white tray allows for convenient cleaning. Built in solid dots on the tray top generate non slip experience while pumping with sponge. Ventilated holes allows for drying sponge, scouring pad fast, drip tray catches residual liquid and has pour spout for easy pouring.
MR.SIGA's mission: Make your housework easier, and make the world cleaner. Please do not hesitate to contact us with any questions you may have, we are here for support and advice!
